<!-- indicator: fig-t3-pos-rc -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-t3-pos-rc
#| fig-cap: 'Top 3 Factors that Make a Positive Contribution to Healthy Living in Rockland County'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Top 3 Factors that Make a Positive Contribution to Healthy Living in Rockland County.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-t3-pos-rc", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
